source.scope: Official-source-backed Sri Lanka standard individual taxable-income schedules for years of assessment 2024-25 through 2026-27, excluding capital gains and special-rate income.

LK.notes: Standard individual taxable-income schedule on caller-confirmed taxable income. Investment gains, terminal benefits, special-rate business income and APIT withholding remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Standard resident and non-resident individual income tax on caller-confirmed taxable income, excluding investment gains and special-rate schedules.
